reasoning: We need to target your lactate clearance limiter by incorporating over-under intervals to increase your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed a moderate effort, which suggests you are in a good state to push a little harder. This session directly connects to the main climb of the Alpine Loop, where maintaining power and managing fatigue is key.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 8-minute intervals: 2 minutes at 95-100% FTP (242-256W), 2 minutes at 85-88% FTP (201-209W), repeat twice per set.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
